arts.ttl: “This is the last time” – Carlo Ancelotti threatens La Liga over Real Madrid rest issue
arts.sum: Real Madrid secured a very important victory on Saturday as they came from behind to defeat Villarreal 2-1 at La Ceramica. arts.ttl: Mbappé scores twice to give Real Madrid 2-1 win against Villarreal in La Liga
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé scored twice to lead Real Madrid to a 2-1 comeback win at Villarreal and move three points clear atop the Spanish league on Saturday. Barcelona is three points behind Madrid but has played two games less.
